scripts.verify: npm run smoke:optimization && npm run smoke:hud
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --publish never
scripts.dist:linux:publish: npm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --publish always
scripts.dist:windows:all: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 --ia32 --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:windows:x64: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:windows:x86: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --ia32 --publish never
scripts.dist:windows:arm64: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:windows:publish: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 --ia32 --arm64 --publish always
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android

name: astra-voxel-ark
description: A landscape-first voxel sandbox app for web, Android, Ubuntu Linux and Windows
